emphasis: what is being scraped (site, product universe, data shape)
entry points (CLI scripts, scheduled runs, parameters)
concurrency model (asyncio semaphore limits, batch sizes, backoff strategy)
rate-limiting / anti-bot handling (user-agents, proxy, sleeps, retry policy)
output destination (CSV, S3, Postgres, JSON on disk — what lands where)
dependencies on shared infra (database, S3, secrets) and on sibling scrapers
schema-evidence pairs the validator can resolve to file:line

pages.purpose: Project-scoped agent-docs entry for the Beauty Kurly async scraper. Frontmatter-only, conformant to docs/AGENT_DOCS_SCHEMA.md v0.2.

references.note: Sibling scraper in the K-Beauty pipeline. The other (oliveyoung-scraper) is being documented in parallel — likely related via shared downstream DB / S3 layout. Cross-link them via `related[]`. Calibrate shape against src/content/agent-docs/search-trend-scraper.mdx.
